meta.question: Which organization has the fewest models?
meta.finalAnswer: Multiple organizations have the fewest models with exactly 1 model each. The organizations with 1 model include: Org1, Org10, Org11, Org12, Org14, Org15, Org17, Org19, Org2, Org21, Org23, Org24, Org26, Org27, Org28, Org29, Org3, Org30, Org33, and Org34 (at least 20 organizations total have the minimum of 1 model).
